"The AutoFull M6 Ultra is one of my favorite gaming chairs to date. Its overall comfort cover the basics while the lumbar support and neck rest put it above most others; and on top of that, it's fully adjustable, packed with high-end features, has excellent build quality, and is reasonably priced for a premium desk chair. settings.title: World's First Ventilated & Heated Esports Throne
settings.content: Smart climate control for all seasons: 3 manual settings deliver 19°C cooling or 50°C heating. Maintain optimal comfort during extended use.

settings.title: Lumbar Massage System
settings.content: Relieve back pain with the lumbar support's built-in massage feature, featuring two high-frequency vibration motors to keep you relaxed and comfortable during long gaming or work sessions.

settings.title: Dynamic Tracking Lumbar Support
settings.content: 4D Lumbar Support: Manually adjustable through 4 planes (up/down/forward/back) to maintain natural spinal curvature. Laboratory-tested to reduce lower back pressure by 80% during 12-hour use.

settings.title: Tailored Comfort <br class="jingva-md">for Everyone
settings.subtitle: Seamlessly transitions between work, gaming, and leisure with intuitive adjustments.

settings.title: Engineered for <br class="jingva-md">Personal Comfort
settings.subtitle: Precision-adjustable support adapts to your body and activities—effortlessly optimizing for posture, size and preference.

settings.title: 8cm Height Adjustment
settings.content: Featuring an SGS Class 4 gas lift for ultra-smooth, precision height customization—perfect for users from 63" to 74.8" (160-190cm).

settings.title: 20° Rocking Mode
settings.content: Engineered for premium relaxation, the heavy-duty tilt mechanism delivers a stable rocking experience with a 150KG(330lb) load capacity. Achieve maximum comfort with precision-engineered tilt support.

settings.title: 160° Backrest Recline
settings.content: Recline and fully unwind—adjust the backrest to your ideal angle while the built-in footrest support.

settings.title: Featured content

settings.title: 360° Armrests
settings.subtitle: Total arm support, for every posture and moment.

settings.title: Tailored Comfort <br class="jingva-md">for Everyone
settings.subtitle: Adapt to any gaming stance with 360° adjustments—swivel, tilt, and slide. Deliver pro-level arm positioning for FPS, MOBA, and more.

settings.title: Reduce Neck Pressure
settings.subtitle: The 3D ergo-cloud headrest cradles your neck with memory foam, adapting to your movements. Its semi-wrap design reduces 80% cervical pressure during long sessions.

settings.title: Ergonomic Footrests
settings.subtitle: Providing perfect leg support even at full recline. Enjoy tailored positioning whether gaming, working, or relaxing—no more dangling legs.

settings.title: 160° Backrest Recline
settings.subtitle: 160° ultra-recline transforms your chair into a gaming lounger—seamlessly shift from competitive posture to nap-ready tilt with one-handed lever control. The multi-lock mechanism secures any angle between 90-160° for battle or break time.

settings.title: SGS Class-4 Gas Lift
settings.subtitle: Certified explosion-proof gas spring with military-grade steel casing ensures 100% safety. Enjoy buttery-smooth height adjustments without wobble.

settings.title: Aluminum Alloy Wheelbase
settings.subtitle: Engineered with reinforced aluminum alloy base and SGS-certified heavy-duty casters for ultimate stability. Supports 330lbs+ with zero wobble, even during intense gaming sessions.

settings.title: Dynamic TrackingLumbar Support
settings.content: The auto-tracking support moves where you move—up/down/forward/back—to crush lower back pain before it starts. Perfect for 5'4" to 6'5" gamers, with one-knob tension control that remembers your sweet spot. No more slouching, just pro-grade posture for those 12-hour raid nights.

settings.title: Lumbar Massage System
settings.content: Relieve back pain with the lumbar support's built-in massage feature, featuring two high-frequency vibration motors to keep you relaxed and comfortable during long gaming or work sessions.

settings.title: Ventilated & Heated Esports Throne
settings.content: Master every season with smart climate control: Dual turbo fans blast 66°F cooling air to prevent swamp-ass during ranked grind, while carbon-fiber heating (up to 122°F) tackles winter chill
